title: 根岸Sの後に・このままどこまで

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I won! I got first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, that was such a short race. I won before I
knew it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Plus, it felt so good being in the front! ♪
choice_data_list: You kept your cool and ran well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
choice_data_list: Didn't this race feel different from usual?
Didn't this race feel different from usual?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nope! It was as fun as ever!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Every race is a blast! So I just try my best and
have fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter the race, Haru Urara is always the
same. I'd say that's one of her strong suits,
except...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a little nervous can actually result in a
better performance. So I decide to recommend
that she take on a higher level race.
choice_data_list: How about tackling a G1 race next?
How about tackling a G1 race next?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Such a cool name! Yeah, let's do it!
choice_data_list: How about the February Stakes then?
How about the February Stakes then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's surrounded by hard workers, maybe it'll
change her mindset!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
February Stakes? I feel like I've heard that
before... But oh well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sure, let's try this Fairly Lovely Steaks race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Isn't that what I said? These race names are
so hard...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Febru... Febu.. ri... Fairly... What was it again?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide on the next race to shoot for.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara doesn't seem to take anything seriously. I wonder how hard she'll actually compete...
